323 GG0130H3_ON_OFF_FTWR_END_CD GG0130H3_ON_OFF_FTWR_END_CD GG0130H3 Discharge Performance Footwear Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability in putting on/taking off footwear at the time of discharge.
